mission.title: contour: Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide
mission.description: Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current contour deployment
steps.description:
Verify your contour version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour
helm list -n contour 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working contour installation.

steps.title: Review contour configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant contour configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour
kubectl get configmap -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour
```
We need a guide that concisely describes the HTTPProxy configuration and service annotations required to proxy grpc through contour.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide
steps.description:
so far for a test fixture/example I'm planning on starting a new repo and using goreleaser etc. to build it and containerize it

found a few samples that are useful *but* they're all missing something
- [examples in `grpc-go`](https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/tree/master/examples) are great but not
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: adddog-envoy-config
data:
  config.yaml: |
    domain: contour
    admin:
      access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
      address:
        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 9901 }

    static_resources:
      listeners:
      - name: listener_0
        address:
          socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 8080 }
        filter_chains:
        - filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour
kubectl get events -n contour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: so far for a test fixture/example I'm planning on starting a new repo and using goreleaser etc.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: adddog-envoy-config
data:
  config.yaml: |
    domain: contour
    admin:
      access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
      address:
        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 9901 }

    static_resources:
      listeners:
      - name: listener_0
        address:
          socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 8080 }
        filter_chains:
        - filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
              codec_type: auto
              stat_prefix: ingress_http
              route_config:
                name: local_route
                v

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with contour installed or the issue environment reproducible.
